title: Under Texas Skies

actors: Robert Livingston, Bob Steele, Rufe Davis
plot: Stony Brooke returns to his home town only the learn that his father, Sheriff Brooke, has been murdered and that his boyhood friend, Tucson Smith has been convicted and is to hang for the killing. The killing was actually committe...
